title: Rotary Drill Operators, Oil and Gas
description: Set up or operate a variety of drills to remove underground oil and gas, or remove core samples for testing during oil and gas exploration.

tasks.text: Train crews, and introduce procedures to make drill work more safe and effective.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe pressure gauge and move throttles and levers to control the speed of rotary tables, and to regulate pressure of tools at bottoms of boreholes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Count sections of drill rod to determine depths of boreholes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Push levers and brake pedals to control gasoline, diesel, electric, or steam draw works that lower and raise drill pipes and casings in and out of wells.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect sections of drill pipe, using hand tools and powered wrenches and tongs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records of footage drilled, location and nature of strata penetrated, materials and tools used, services rendered, and time required.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain and adjust machinery to ensure proper performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start and examine operation of slush pumps to ensure circulation and consistency of drilling fluid or mud in well.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and recover lost or broken bits, casings, and drill pipes from wells, using special tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weigh clay, and mix with water and chemicals to make drilling mud.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct rig crews in drilling and other activities, such as setting up rigs and completing or servicing wells.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor progress of drilling operations, and select and change drill bits according to the nature of strata, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Repair or replace defective parts of machinery, such as rotary drill rigs, water trucks, air compressors, and pumps, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and oil pulleys, blocks, and cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bolt together pump and engine parts, and connect tanks and flow lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove core samples during drilling to determine the nature of the strata being drilled.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cap wells with packers, or turn valves, to regulate outflow of oil from wells.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Line drilled holes with pipes, and install all necessary hardware, to prepare new wells.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and prepare truck-mounted derricks at drilling areas specified on field maps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plug observation wells, and restore sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
